# kemp_owasp_custom_rule (Data Source)

Looks up a custom OWASP/ModSecurity rule file stored on the LoadMaster by filename.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_owasp_custom_rule" "existing" {
  filename = "owaspcust.conf"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filename` (String) Filename of the OWASP custom rule file (e.g. `owaspcust.conf`).
